item.title: CHERRY – Smart Mesh Mid-Back Task Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The CHERRY chair by Trosta is a compact ergonomic solution for modern workspaces. Featuring a breathable mesh backrest, fixed armrests, and a plush grey fabric seat, it ensures all-day comfort while maintaining a clean, minimalist look. The lumbar support built into the mesh back helps reduce posture fatigue, while the chrome base and smooth castors offer reliable mobility and durability. Ideal for home offices, startups, or staff seating, CHERRY is a perfect blend of practicality and polish.
item.excerpt:encoded: Simple. Sleek. Supportive. The CHERRY chair delivers ergonomic comfort in a compact design. 🍒🪑 #TrostaCherry #SmartSeating

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Compact ergonomic office chair with black mesh backrest, grey cushioned seat, and chrome base.

item.title: TROSTA VC01 – Classic Comfort Visitor Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The TROSTA VC01 is a timeless visitor chair built for comfort and durability. With its padded backrest, wide cushioned seat, and ergonomically curved armrests, this chair provides a welcoming seating experience for guests and clients alike. The robust metal frame with cross-support ensures lasting stability, while the elegant black leatherette finish offers a professional look suitable for reception areas, meeting rooms, and workstations. It’s a perfect blend of minimal design and maximum comfort.
item.excerpt:encoded: Sleek. Sturdy. Welcoming. The VC01 is the perfect visitor chair for your office space. 🖤🪑 #TrostaVC01 #OfficeVisitorChair

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Black cushioned visitor chair with fixed armrests and sturdy powder-coated metal legs.

item.title: 121 HB – Ergonomic High-Back Mesh Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The 121 HB by Trosta is a modern ergonomic high-back chair engineered for all-day performance. Featuring a breathable mesh backrest, adjustable headrest, and lumbar-friendly contouring, this chair is built to reduce fatigue and increase focus. The padded seat offers balanced cushioning, while the synchronized tilt mechanism and adjustable armrests provide personalized posture support. Designed for modern offices, work-from-home setups, and co-working spaces, the 121 HB blends flexibility with functionality like no other.
item.excerpt:encoded: Lightweight feel. Heavyweight support. The 121 HB chair keeps you cool, aligned, and in control. 🧠💼 #Trosta121HB #ErgoEdge

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Grey ergonomic high-back mesh office chair with adjustable headrest, armrests, and five-wheel base.

item.title: ZENOS – Advanced Ergonomic Mesh High-Back Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The ZENOS by Trosta is a high-performance ergonomic chair designed to support long work hours without compromising posture or comfort. With a segmented mesh backrest and headrest, ZENOS provides superior lumbar, neck, and upper back support while promoting airflow for a cool seating experience. Its contoured seat with high-density foam, 3D adjustable armrests, and synchro-tilt mechanism ensure perfect alignment and balance for every body type. Ideal for tech professionals, executives, and creators seeking focused performance in their workspace.
item.excerpt:encoded: Smart support meets breathable design. The ZENOS chair is built for professionals who demand precision and comfort. 🔧🪑 #TrostaZenos #NextGenSeating

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Grey ergonomic high-back mesh office chair with segmented backrest, adjustable headrest, and chrome base.

item.title: ETIOS – Executive Comfort High-Back Office Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The ETIOS chair by Trosta delivers a powerful blend of style, comfort, and performance. Designed with a contoured high back, plush cushioning, and bold white stitching, this executive chair exudes authority and comfort. Its padded armrests and wide seating area offer lasting support, while the heavy-duty chrome base with castors ensures easy mobility and durability. Ideal for corporate offices, manager cabins, and decision-makers who demand performance with a premium touch.
item.excerpt:encoded: Bold, supportive, and built for success. The ETIOS chair keeps you focused and comfortable all day long. 🖤💼 #TrostaEtios #CommandYourComfort

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Black high-back executive office chair with white contrast stitching, padded armrests, and a chrome base.

item.title: Octiva Diamond – Elegant Executive High-Back Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The Octiva Diamond by Trosta is crafted to reflect elegance and professionalism. Featuring a tall, supportive backrest with bold diamond-stitched detailing, this high-back chair exudes both comfort and class. Wrapped in premium leatherette and paired with metallic-finish armrests, Octiva Diamond makes a stylish statement in executive offices and high-level boardrooms. Its sturdy chrome base and smooth-rolling castors ensure mobility and durability, while its ergonomic shape keeps you supported throughout long workdays.
item.excerpt:encoded: Where design meets authority. The Octiva Diamond chair adds luxury, posture, and presence to your workspace. 💼✨ #TrostaOctivaDiamond #ExecutiveElegance

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: High-back brown executive office chair with diamond-stitched backrest, chrome base, and sleek armrests.

item.title: BUBBLE – Ultra-Plush Comfort High-Back Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The BUBBLE chair by Trosta redefines what comfort means in the workplace. Featuring deep, segmented cushioning and premium turquoise blue leatherette, it’s designed to make every work session feel like a lounge experience. The high-back ergonomic form ensures full lumbar and upper back support, while the generously padded armrests add to the relaxed feel. Built on a chrome-finish base with smooth castors, BUBBLE delivers both style and softness in equal measure – ideal for executive cabins or creative workspaces looking for a vibrant touch.
item.excerpt:encoded: Feel the comfort, rule the day. The BUBBLE chair wraps you in soft support from 9 to 5 and beyond. 💙 #TrostaBubble #OfficeComfortRedefined

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Turquoise blue high-back office chair with plush padding, chrome base, and cushioned armrests.

item.title: FLEXI – Sleek High-Back Executive Office Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: The FLEXI chair from Trosta is a perfect blend of ergonomic design and contemporary aesthetics. With its clean lines, contoured high-back structure, and plush cushioning, FLEXI supports your posture while enhancing the visual appeal of your workspace. The matte brown leatherette finish pairs seamlessly with sculpted chrome armrests and a durable five-legged chrome base for smooth movement and lasting strength. Designed for conference rooms, cabins, and modern offices, FLEXI brings comfort without compromising on style.
item.excerpt:encoded: Simple. Smart. Stylish. The FLEXI chair is built for those who value comfort with a modern edge.✨ #TrostaFlexi #WorkSmartSitSmart

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: High-back brown office chair with chrome armrests and base, featuring a sleek, modern design.

item.title: KENZO – Premium Executive High-Back Office Chair
item.dc:creator: trostachairs.com
item.content:encoded: Introducing KENZO – a premium executive high-back revolving chair designed for modern leaders. Upholstered in rich brown leatherette with elegant diamond-stitched detailing, the KENZO chair combines luxury, comfort, and authority in one commanding presence. Its contoured backrest provides full spine support, while plush armrests and a wide seat ensure all-day ease. The sturdy chrome base with smooth-rolling casters completes the blend of functionality and sophistication – ideal for premium workspaces, cabins, or boardrooms.
item.excerpt:encoded: Elevate your workspace with the KENZO chair – where luxury meets ergonomic excellence. 💼🪑 #TrostaKenzo #ExecutiveComfort

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Luxurious brown leather high-back executive office chair with diamond-stitched pattern and chrome base.
